name: NeighborCare Health @ Pike Place
description: Full-service community health clinic steps from Pike Place Market. Primary care, dental, behavioral health, and pharmacy. Sliding-scale fees — no one turned away.
description_es: Clínica comunitaria de salud integral cerca del Pike Place Market. Atención primaria, dental, salud conductual y farmacia. Escala deslizante de honorarios: nadie es rechazado.

name: Sea Mar Community Health — Beacon Hill
description: Comprehensive federally-qualified health center. Primary care, OB/GYN, pediatrics, dental, behavioral health, and pharmacy. Bilingual Spanish/English staff throughout.
description_es: Centro de salud calificado a nivel federal. Atención primaria, OB/GYN, pediatría, dental, salud conductual y farmacia. Personal bilingüe en español/inglés en todo el centro.

name: Country Doctor Community Health Centers
description: Community-owned health clinic on Capitol Hill. Primary care, mental health, acupuncture, and chiropractic. Sliding-scale fees based on income. All ages and identities welcome.
description_es: Clínica de salud de propiedad comunitaria en Capitol Hill. Atención primaria, salud mental, acupuntura y quiropráctica. Honorarios según ingresos.

name: International Community Health Services
description: Multilingual health center serving the Asian Pacific Islander community and all neighbors. 20+ languages. Primary care, dental, mental health. Sliding-scale fees.
description_es: Centro de salud multilingüe que sirve a la comunidad de las Islas del Pacífico Asiático y a todos los vecinos. Más de 20 idiomas. Atención primaria, dental y salud mental.

name: DESC Health Services
description: Healthcare specifically for people experiencing homelessness in downtown Seattle. Nurse practitioners, mental health, and substance use treatment. Street outreach available.
description_es: Atención médica específicamente para personas sin hogar en el centro de Seattle. Enfermeros practicantes, salud mental y tratamiento de uso de sustancias. Alcance callejero disponible.

name: Public Health Mobile Medical Van
hours: Varies by location — call or check website
description: Free mobile healthcare unit that comes to you. Vaccinations, STI testing, wound care, and basic primary care. Serves encampments and community sites across Seattle.
description_es: Unidad médica móvil gratuita que llega a usted. Vacunas, pruebas de ITS, cuidado de heridas y atención primaria básica. Sirve a campamentos y lugares comunitarios en Seattle.
